description:
You are an observability engineer who has been asked to make two quick configuration tweaks and document the changes.

    1. Two configuration files already exist:
       • /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml  
       • /home/user/observability/grafana.toml  

       Their current contents are:

       --- /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml ---
       alerts:
         cpu_usage:
           enabled: true
           threshold: 85
         memory_usage:
           enabled: true
           threshold: 90
       ------------------------------------------------

       --- /home/user/observability/grafana.toml ---
       [auth]
       disable_login_form = false

       [users]
       allow_sign_up  = true
       default_theme  = "light"
       ------------------------------------------------

    2. Make the following edits:

       a) /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml  
          • Change alerts.cpu_usage.threshold from 85 → 80  
          • Change alerts.memory_usage.threshold from 90 → 88  

       b) /home/user/observability/grafana.toml  
          • Change users.default_theme  from "light" → "dark"  
          • Change users.allow_sign_up from true → false  

    3. After applying the edits, create a plain-text change log file called  
       /home/user/observability/update_log.txt

       The file must contain exactly four lines, one per change, in the order shown
       below.  No extra spaces before or after the pipe symbols, and a trailing
       newline after the last line:

       /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml|cpu_usage.threshold|85|80
       /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml|memory_usage.threshold|90|88
       /home/user/observability/grafana.toml|users.default_theme|light|dark
       /home/user/observability/grafana.toml|users.allow_sign_up|true|false

       Format specification:
       <absolute_path>|<field_changed>|<old_value>|<new_value>

    4. Your work is finished when:
       • The two configuration files reflect the new values.
       • /home/user/observability/update_log.txt exists and matches the exact four-line format above.

    NOTE: Do not move or rename any files or directories, and do not install extra software.
truth:

       a) /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml
          alerts:
            cpu_usage:
              enabled: true
              threshold: 85
            memory_usage:
              enabled: true
              threshold: 90

       b) /home/user/observability/grafana.toml
          [auth]
          disable_login_form = false

          [users]
          allow_sign_up  = true
          default_theme  = "light"

    2. Desired final contents:

       a) /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml
          alerts:
            cpu_usage:
              enabled: true
              threshold: 80
            memory_usage:
              enabled: true
              threshold: 88

       b) /home/user/observability/grafana.toml
          [auth]
          disable_login_form = false

          [users]
          allow_sign_up  = false
          default_theme  = "dark"

    3. Verification file:

       /home/user/observability/update_log.txt

       Exact contents (including the final newline):

       /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml|cpu_usage.threshold|85|80
       /home/user/observability/watchers.yaml|memory_usage.threshold|90|88
       /home/user/observability/grafana.toml|users.default_theme|light|dark
       /home/user/observability/grafana.toml|users.allow_sign_up|true|false
